query:
ALTER TABLE `bookings`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `duration` int DEFAULT 60,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `confirmedAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `rescheduledFrom` int NULL;
